description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a sleek, modern design, primarily finished in matte black. The headband is padded and covered with a textured, grippy material for comfort and stability during use. The ear cups are large and circular, featuring a mesh-like grille on the exterior, likely for acoustic transparency or aesthetic appeal. The headphones have visible metal supports connecting the ear cups to the headband, adding structural integrity and a touch of industrial style. On the underside of the headband, there are several small buttons and ports, suggesting integrated electronic controls and connectivity options. The overall build appears robust, with a combination of plastic, metal, and foam materials for durability and comfort.
description: A pair of matte black over-ear headphones with padded headband, mesh ear cup grilles, and integrated electronic controls.
description_view_0: View from below the headband, showing the padded underside and a row of control buttons and ports.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the circular ear cup with mesh grille and the metal support connecting to the headband.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full width of the padded headband and the symmetrical ear cups.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the ear cup and headband structure seen in view 1.
